title: mentha × maximilianea var. baileyi
intro: Mentha × maximilianea var. baileyi, also known as Apple Mint, is a variety of apple-scented mint that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, such as indigestion and nausea, due to its carminative and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Mentha × maximilianea var. baileyi include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve respiratory issues, and provide relief from headaches and fever. Apple Mint can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or essential oil, which can be used topically or ingested to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
